recommendations.title: Lost in the Sun
recommendations.overview: A small time crook and a newly-orphaned teenage boy team up to perform a string of robberies.

recommendations.title: I've Loved You So Long
recommendations.overview: A woman struggles to interact with her family and find her place in society after spending fifteen years in prison.

recommendations.title: Close to the Horizon
recommendations.overview: Jessica knows exactly what her life is supposed to look like and where it takes her. But then she meets Danny. He has a complicated past and could confuse all their plans. Jessica has to decide.

recommendations.title: All Day and a Night
recommendations.overview: While serving life in prison, a young man looks back at the people, the circumstances and the system that set him on the path toward his crime.

recommendations.title: 44 Inch Chest
recommendations.overview: Colin is in agony, shattered by his wife’s infidelity, so his friends kidnap the wife's lover so he can have his revenge.

recommendations.title: Down by Love
recommendations.overview: A man, a woman. A prison director, his inmate. An impossible love, a true story.

recommendations.title: The Prince and the Pauper
recommendations.overview: Long ago in a land with an ailing king, there was a pair of boys who looked exactly alike, a pauper called Mickey and the other, the Crown Prince.

recommendations.title: Breaking & Exiting
recommendations.overview: Harry, a charming house thief, gets more than he bargains for during an attempted burglary when he stumbles upon Daisy and decides to save her from herself, sending both of them into a darkly comedic journey of self discovery and love.

recommendations.title: Mona Lisa
recommendations.overview: George is a small-time crook just out of prison who discovers his tough-guy image is out of date. Reduced to working as a minder/driver for high class call girl Simone, he has to agree when she asks him to find a young colleague from her King's Cross

recommendations.title: Max
recommendations.overview: Max is 6 years old. She lives with her dad Toni, a small time crook with a golden heart. For Xmas, Max offers him Rose, a call-girl found on the street whom she’s very fond of. Despite the complicated situation, Toni’s gonna have a hard time refusing
